title: Karnataka 2nd PUC results 2026 announced on April 9 LIVE: Where, when to check KSEAB 12th results when announced?
description: Karnataka 2nd PUC Results 2026 LIVE: KSEAB PUC 2 results will be announced today, April 9, 2026. Follow the blog for latest updates on results, direct link, how to check and more.
